modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message after logging into myUSDPortal.

full_description_text: I was trying to log in to myUSDPortal, you know, the one at https://internal.usd.edu/d2l-engagement-report/index.cfm. Then, suddenly, an error popped up, and it said something like "An error occurred. Contact your administrator for more information." It was really confusing because I just wanted to access my account, but instead, I got this strange message. The error details mentioned an Activity ID, which I don't really understand, and something about a relying party, cas.usd.edu.
short_description: Error message after logging into myUSDPortal.
